references.title: An AI-based open recommender system for personalized labor market driven education

annotations.text: Education in the 21st century needs to rapidly adapt to everchanging demands from the job market. Data, as always, can help due to its unprecedented availability. Authors propose eDoer, a new educational recommender system that is labor market oriented.

Experiments using a randomized experiment test whether learners who engaged with eDoer acquired more knowledge than those who did not. While interacting with the system seems to lead to better scores, there is not significant different between students who received personalized recommendations vs those who did not.
